title: Caravel(a)
description: A modpack made to Caravel(A) project. A smp focused on making a bridge between cultures
body:
This is Caravel(A) a modpack made by brazilians to the world.

It's carries a significant amount of tecnology and adventure mods such as ''Create'' and ''When Dungeons Arise''. 

It's meant to be a multiplayer modpack, but, it still works very well in a singleplayer map.

Also it has many small mods that can make the game more instering by adding small stuff that can change the way you play the game - example: ''Relics''

There's also mods focused on food like ''Farmers Delight''

Need a hosting server?

Kinetic Hosting reached us out for the paternship program and told us to test the server for a week and give our honest review.

We were struggling with bad hosting services, poor ping and even service closing before the payment deadline. First we were a little bit scared due to it's low price - by the time we're renting a VPS for 44$ a month for 32gb on this modpack for 30-50 active players. We we're having TPS problems, lag spikes, render distance issues and honestly, we were going crazy. We thought all of the experience we had setting up servers, creating modpacks was nothing and it was the modpack the fault. We removed a bunch of mods, tried changing the server location and nothing seemed to work. Kinetic offered us a 16gb to test and and with this ammount of ram suddenly, 99% of our problems were gone. The TPS stayed consistent in 17-20, the render issue was COMPLETELY fixed and our players stopped having crazy lag spikes. Kinetic is LIFE-SAVING. 

https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=1343 please consider trying then!!
![Kinetic Hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f69c5ff58ef061c0e6fadee4a7a4a8f00e3fcaf3_0.webp)



OBS: only use the oculus mod that comes in the modpack
